creator: Microsoft
description: Collection of Microsoft Select CD-ROM Update Kits. "Receipt of your enrollment will automatically generate your one free Select CD-ROM Update Kit subscription that will run for the duration of the enrollment. Subscription customers will automatically receive a Select CD-ROM Update Kit approximately every 45 days or eight (8) kits per year until the end of their Microsoft Select Agreement. These shipments will be grouped by month of release and by language groups within each pool (application, system, and server). Select Update Kits ship in January, February, April, May, July, August, October, and November of every calendar year. You will receive only the pools you currently have specified on your Microsoft Select Enrollment Agreement at the time of shipment." Language Groupings effective with the January 2000 Select CD-ROM Update Kit: Language Group CD Color Languages Included on CD (in alphabetical order) Group 0 Burgundy Australian English, English, International English and U.S. English Group 1 Burgundy Basque, Brazilian, Catalan, French, French-Canadian, Portuguese and Spanish Group 2 Brown Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, German, Italian, Norwegian, Slovak and Swedish Purple Arabic, Greek, Hebrew, Hungarian, Polish, Russian, and Turkish Group 3 Green Chinese-Simplified, Chinese-Traditional, , Korean, and Thai
subject: Microsoft Select
title: Microsoft Select
